svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 438px; height: 1px; padding-top: 129px; margin-left: 12px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #0C34B1;
display: inline-block; font-size: 20px; font-family: 'Architects Daughter'; color: #0C34B1; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
steps:
- name: "Build static version of microCI"
description: "Description of this step"
docker: "gcc:14"
network: bridge
run_as: root
envs:
ENV1: "value of the environment variable"
plugin:
name: bash

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #CC0000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: 'Architects Daughter'; color: #CC0000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
